ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the performance metrics (e.g., 1 Week, 1 Month) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock during the period */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "avg_daily_vol" INTEGER /* Average daily volume of trades */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute change in price */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "trading_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of trading sessions within the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being monitored */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, decrease) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which this data pertains */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on this date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on this date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during this date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during this date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of stocks traded on this date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
